title: Sword Blocking Plus
description: Adds the classic sword blocking mechanic as an enchantment to weapons.
body:
# Sword Blocking Plus
**Sword Blocking Plus** is an add-on that reintroduces the classic pre-1.9 [sword blocking](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Sword_blocking) as an enchantment.

## Features
- Adds a custom enchantment, **Blocking**, which;
- If applied to a weapon (swords, axes, or maces), allows the enchanted weapon to block attacks similar to a shield.
- Has two levels:
  - **Blocking I**
    - Faithful to pre-1.9 sword blocking
    - Blocks 50% of damage
    - Takes away 6 durability per hit.
  - **Blocking II**
    - Similar to modern shields
    - Blocks 100% of damage
    - Takes away 25 durability per hit.

## Installation
- Data Pack
  - Drop the datapack in your world’s `datapacks` folder
- Fabric / Quilt / Forge / NeoForge
  - Drop the .jar file in the `%appdata%/.minecraft/mods` folder

## Not Compatible With
- Other datapacks or modifications that adds Sword Blocking
